agents.name: Travel Orchestrator
agents.task: Receive travel request, open GitHub issue, determine semver bump, and coordinate the full agent pipeline

agents.name: Travel Researcher
agents.task: Research flights, hotels, activities, visa requirements, and travel advisories for the requested trip

agents.name: Travel Designer
agents.task: Design a detailed day-by-day itinerary with budget breakdown and booking requirements from the research

agents.name: Travel Developer
agents.task: Build a booking platform from the itinerary: create a git branch, scaffold FastAPI app, integrate flight/hotel/activity APIs, write tests, open a PR targeting main

agents.name: Travel Reviewer
agents.task: Review the developer's PR: validate itinerary feasibility, run tests, security scan, approve or request changes, merge and tag the semver release
